voiceover: You think you're lazy. You're not. These 8 things feel like personality flaws but they're actually ADHD. Forgetting a conversation you just had. Losing track of time and suddenly it's dark outside. Starting five tasks and finishing zero. Reading the same sentence four times. Saying yes then immediately dreading it. Feeling everything too intensely or nothing at all. Being exhausted by doing basically nothing. And hyperfocusing on one thing for six hours straight. None of that is a character flaw. It's your brain wired differently. Now you know. Follow for daily ADHD content.

title: 8 Things That Feel Normal But Are Actually ADHD #Shorts
description: Think you're just lazy or forgetful? These 8 everyday experiences feel like personality flaws but are actually common signs of ADHD. From time blindness to emotional intensity, understanding your brain is the first step. Follow for daily ADHD content.
